name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potential Equation Group Indicators
notes:
This Building Block detects suspicious shell commands used in various Equation Group scripts and tools.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Equation Group Indicators
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious shell commands used in various Equation Group scripts and tools


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potential Equation Group Indicators on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chown root*chmod 4777 ' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cp /bin/sh .;chown' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 4777 /tmp/.scsi/dev/bin/gsh' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chown root:root /tmp/.scsi/dev/bin/' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chown root:root x;' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '/bin/telnet locip locport < /dev/console | /bin/sh' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '/tmp/ratload' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ewok -t ' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'xspy -display ' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cat > /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/80 <<end' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'rm -f /current/tmp/ftshell.latest' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ghost_* -v ' or LOWER("Command") LIKE ' --wipe > /dev/null' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ping -c 2 *; grep * /proc/net/arp >/tmp/gx' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'iptables * output -p tcp -d 127.0.0.1 --tcp-flags rst rst -j drop;' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '> /var/log/audit/audit.log; rm -f .' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cp /var/log/audit/audit.log .tmp' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'sh >/dev/tcp/* <&1 2>&1' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ncat -vv -l -p * <' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'nc -vv -l -p * <' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '< /dev/console | uudecode && uncompress' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'sendmail -osendmail;chmod +x sendmail' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '/usr/bin/wget -o /tmp/a http* && chmod 755 /tmp/cron' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 666 /var/run/utmp~' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 nscd crond' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cp /etc/shadow /tmp/.' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '</dev/console |uudecode > /dev/null 2>&1 && uncompress' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 jp&&netstat -an|grep' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'uudecode > /dev/null 2>&1 && uncompress -f * && chmod 755' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 crond' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'wget http*; chmod +x /tmp/sendmail' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 fp sendmail pt' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 755 /usr/vmsys/bin/pipe' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod -r 755 /usr/vmsys' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 755 $opbin/*tunnel' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 sendmail' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 0700 sendmail' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '/usr/bin/wget http*sendmail;chmod +x sendmail;' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '&& telnet * 2>&1 </dev/console') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potential Equation Group Indicators on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

grep * /proc/net/arp >/tmp/gx' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'iptables * output -p tcp -d 127.0.0.1 --tcp-flags rst rst -j drop;' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '> /var/log/audit/audit.log; rm -f .' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cp /var/log/audit/audit.log .tmp' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'sh >/dev/tcp/* <&1 2>&1' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'ncat -vv -l -p * <' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'nc -vv -l -p * <' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '< /dev/console | uudecode && uncompress' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'sendmail -osendmail;chmod +x sendmail' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '/usr/bin/wget -o /tmp/a http* && chmod 755 /tmp/cron' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 666 /var/run/utmp~' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 nscd crond' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'cp /etc/shadow /tmp/.' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '</dev/console |uudecode > /dev/null 2>&1 && uncompress' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 jp&&netstat -an|grep' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'uudecode > /dev/null 2>&1 && uncompress -f * && chmod 755' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 crond' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'wget http*; chmod +x /tmp/sendmail' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 fp sendmail pt' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 755 /usr/vmsys/bin/pipe' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod -r 755 /usr/vmsys' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 755 $opbin/*tunnel' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 700 sendmail' or LOWER("Command") LIKE 'chmod 0700 sendmail' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '/usr/bin/wget http*sendmail;chmod +x sendmail;' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '&& telnet * 2>&1 </dev/console') AQL filter query
